title: My Portion Forever

sections.label: Intro
lines: In the shadow of doubt, I wandered astray,
Till light unveiled the righteous way.
Through valleys deep, Your love prevails,
Guiding my heart where hope never fails.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: My feet had slipped, my spirit weak,
Envy burned as the proud seemed free.
Yet their treasures fade, their glory falls,
In You alone, my soul stands tall.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: I was blind to grace, consumed by strife,
Yet You, O Lord, restored my life.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are my strength, my portion forever,
Through trials and storms, we stand together.
Whom have I in heaven but Thee?
My refuge, my rock, eternally.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Their fleeting days like shadows pass,
But Your steadfast love shall ever last.
You hold my hand, You guide my feet,
In Your embrace, my joy’s complete.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: When my heart fails and flesh grows frail,
Your covenant of love will never pale.
Earth may crumble, skies may fall,
Still You remain my all in all.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: You are my strength, my portion forever,
Through trials and storms, we stand together.
Whom have I in heaven but Thee?
My refuge, my rock, eternally.

sections.label: Outro
lines: And so I’ll sing through endless days,
In Your glory, forever I’ll stay.

epigraph: but God is the strength of my heart
